'''âsh-dh-t-n''' ('''kashadhtenoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:magnetize|magnetize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-dh-t-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:magnetize|magnetize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âsh-dh-t-n
|-
! Lemma
| kashadhtenoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== Subject agreement ===
''Object fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thishadhtenoko || jishadhtenoko || shishadhtenoko || kishadhtenoko
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthushadhtenoko || jujushadhtenoko || shushushadhtenoko || kukushadhtenoko
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thushadhtenoko || jushadhtenoko || shushadhtenoko || kushadhtenoko
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thushadhtenoko || jushadhtenoko || shushadhtenoko || kushadhtenoko
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || theshadhtenoko || jeshadhtenoko || sheshadhtenoko || keshadhtenoko
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothoshadhtenoko || jojoshadhtenoko || shoshoshadhtenoko || kokoshadhtenoko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thoshadhtenoko || joshadhtenoko || shoshadhtenoko || koshadhtenoko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thoshadhtenoko || joshadhtenoko || shoshadhtenoko || koshadhtenoko
|-

|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || shadhtenoko || shadhtenoko || shadhtenoko || shadhtenoko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || shadhtenoko || shadhtenoko || shadhtenoko || shadhtenoko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || shadhtenoko || shadhtenoko || shadhtenoko || shadhtenoko
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thĂŠshadhtenoko || jĂŠshadhtenoko || shĂŠshadhtenoko || kĂŠshadhtenoko
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathashadhtenoko || jajashadhtenoko || shashashadhtenoko || kakashadhtenoko
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thashadhtenoko || jashadhtenoko || shashadhtenoko || kashadhtenoko
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thashadhtenoko || jashadhtenoko || shashadhtenoko || kashadhtenoko
|}
=== Object agreement ===
''Subject fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || shashadhtenithi || shashadhteniji || shashadhtenishi || shashadhteniki
